sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26799" key="dihxhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διηχ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n26799.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sonorous,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4014.tlg001:16:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Prisc.Lyd.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
